overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character exploring a Spanish colonial town. The character walks through covered arcades, enters a church to observe the interior, and explores an upstairs hallway in an adjacent building. The setting features white stucco architecture, arched walkways, and bright desert lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered arcade with white stucco walls and stone pillars. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the right. The space is sheltered with diffused natural light coming from the open end ahead.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright sunlight, the character approaches a large white church with arched doorways. The open courtyard features stone planters and paved tiles, with the church facade dominating the view ahead.

segments.scene_description: Inside the church, the character walks down the central aisle between wooden pews toward the ornate stone altar. A nun kneels at the altar rail while another walks across the nave. The character reaches the front, turns around, and walks back toward the entrance, passing religious paintings and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: side building entrance and wooden staircase

events.description: exits church and enters adjacent building through side door
begins ascending wooden staircase to upper floor

wooden door at top of stairs leading to hallway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the church through wooden doors, briefly steps outside, then enters an adjacent building. Inside, the character ascends a steep wooden staircase with a handrail, moving from the ground floor toward an upper landing.

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters a long upstairs hallway with wooden floors and dim lighting from wall sconces. Two NPCs sit in chairs along the left wall. The character walks down the corridor passing wooden doors and windows that let in natural light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered colonial arcade into the bright openness of a church courtyard and finally into the dim interiors of a residential building. It begins within a covered walkway of white stucco and stone pillars, moving past seated NPCs toward a burst of bright sunlight. As the camera emerges into the open courtyard, it approaches a large white church and glides through its arched doorways to traverse the central aisle between wooden pews and an ornate altar. The scene then shifts as the character exits the church and enters an adjacent building, ascending a steep wooden staircase to reach an upper level. Finally, the movement flows into a long, dimly lit upstairs hallway with wooden floors and wall sconces, passing windows and seated figures along the corridor.
